description: An island nation in East Asia known for its dense cities, imperial palaces, and advanced technology.
The largest country in South America, famous for its Amazon basin, vibrant culture, and vast coastline.
A European country with a long Mediterranean coastline, deeply rooted in history, art, and world-renowned cuisine.
A North American country stretching from the Atlantic to the Pacific, known for its vast wilderness and multicultural cities.
A sovereign country comprising the mainland of the Australian continent, famous for its unique wildlife and beaches.
